title: The Agentic OS Setup That Will 10x Claude Code
summary: Chase AI recommends building an Agentic OS framework to enhance Claude Code capabilities through skills management, loop engineering, and memory management. The approach provides customization benefits and enables sharing outputs with non-technical teams.
writeup: The video lays out an "Agentic OS" framework for extending Claude Code, organized around three components: skills management, loop engineering, and memory management. The argument is that structuring these layers adds customization and makes it possible to share outputs with non-technical teams rather than keeping results confined to engineers. The practical takeaway is treating Claude Code as a configurable system built from reusable skills, controlled execution loops, and persistent memory instead of one-off prompting.
